Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and low total protein and globulin, possibly indicating malnutrition or protein loss. Albumin is slightly high, which may be relative due to low globulin. LDL cholesterol is elevated, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters, including liver enzymes, glucose, and electrolytes, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and nutritional status.
